sections.title: Standard dialogue prior to Spirits of the Elid

lines.speaker: Zahra
lines.text: True. We've not fallen on the best of times here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any way that I can help?

lines.speaker: Zahra
lines.text: Possibly. I'd go talk to Awusah the Mayor of Nardah. He's in the big house on the east side of the town square.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after completing Spirits of the Elid

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's life now the curse has been lifted?

lines.speaker: Zahra
lines.text: Much better thanks to you. We're all very impressed.
